markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align on GTM campaign performance and define priorities.](https://fathom.video/share/cQouAwkMJGaCszjAm8Sdo4JY3skgLkQx?tab=summary&timestamp=175.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Growth Cafe Promo:** Head, VP, and Director titles drove 92% of positive replies, making them the new targeting priority for events.](https://fathom.video/share/cQouAwkMJGaCszjAm8Sdo4JY3skgLkQx?tab=summary&timestamp=231.0)
  - [**Fletch Workshop:** Understory will own outreach for the Feb 26 event, targeting Rob Fletch's followers, who previously responded 4x better than cold leads.](https://fathom.video/share/cQouAwkMJGaCszjAm8Sdo4JY3skgLkQx?tab=summary&timestamp=541.0)
  - [**SIFT Campaign:** The automated LinkedIn engagement router will launch next week, adding a HubSpot suppression step to protect existing sales conversations.](https://fathom.video/share/cQouAwkMJGaCszjAm8Sdo4JY3skgLkQx?tab=summary&timestamp=790.0)
  - [**Sales Handoff:** A new process will send all qualified leads event invites, with Tyler Pavlas following up personally to accelerate pipeline growth toward a 60+ new opportunities/month goal.](https://fathom.video/share/cQouAwkMJGaCszjAm8Sdo4JY3skgLkQx?tab=summary&timestamp=1141.0)

## Topics

### Growth Cafe Promo Analysis

  - [Analysis of the Growth Cafe event promo revealed key targeting insights:](https://fathom.video/share/cQouAwkMJGaCszjAm8Sdo4JY3skgLkQx?tab=summary&timestamp=231.0)
  - [**Positive Replies by Seniority:**](https://fathom.video/share/cQouAwkMJGaCszjAm8Sdo4JY3skgLkQx?tab=summary&timestamp=231.0)
      - [Head: 35%](https://fathom.video/share/cQouAwkMJGaCszjAm8Sdo4JY3skgLkQx?tab=summary&timestamp=231.0)
      - [VP: 30%](https://fathom.video/share/cQouAwkMJGaCszjAm8Sdo4JY3skgLkQx?tab=summary&timestamp=231.0)
      - [Director: 27%](https://fathom.video/share/cQouAwkMJGaCszjAm8Sdo4JY3skgLkQx?tab=summary&timestamp=231.0)
      - [C-Level: 8.5%](https://fathom.video/share/cQouAwkMJGaCszjAm8Sdo4JY3skgLkQx?tab=summary&timestamp=231.0)
      - [Manager: 0%](https://fathom.video/share/cQouAwkMJGaCszjAm8Sdo4JY3skgLkQx?tab=summary&timestamp=231.0)
  - [**Positive Replies by Department:** Marketing, Brand, Partnership, Growth (in order).](https://fathom.video/share/cQouAwkMJGaCszjAm8Sdo4JY3skgLkQx?tab=summary&timestamp=297.0)
  - [**Action:** Future event campaigns will prioritize Head, VP, and Director titles.](https://fathom.video/share/cQouAwkMJGaCszjAm8Sdo4JY3skgLkQx?tab=summary&timestamp=266.0)

### Event Strategy & Performance

  - [Event performance varies by type, requiring different strategies:](https://fathom.video/share/cQouAwkMJGaCszjAm8Sdo4JY3skgLkQx?tab=summary&timestamp=348.0)
      - [**Breakfasts:** High registrations, low show rates.](https://fathom.video/share/cQouAwkMJGaCszjAm8Sdo4JY3skgLkQx?tab=summary&timestamp=489.0)
      - [**Dinners:** High-touch, text-message-driven invites.](https://fathom.video/share/cQouAwkMJGaCszjAm8Sdo4JY3skgLkQx?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
      - [**Workshops:** The key growth opportunity.](https://fathom.video/share/cQouAwkMJGaCszjAm8Sdo4JY3skgLkQx?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [**Fletch Workshop (Feb 26):**](https://fathom.video/share/cQouAwkMJGaCszjAm8Sdo4JY3skgLkQx?tab=summary&timestamp=541.0)
      - [**Goal:** Drive attendance from Rob Fletch's \~60k followers.](https://fathom.video/share/cQouAwkMJGaCszjAm8Sdo4JY3skgLkQx?tab=summary&timestamp=663.0)
      - [**Rationale:** The Casey workshop proved this tactic works, with followers responding 4x better than cold leads.](https://fathom.video/share/cQouAwkMJGaCszjAm8Sdo4JY3skgLkQx?tab=summary&timestamp=609.0)
      - [**Ownership:** Understory will own all outreach (email/LinkedIn copy, execution).](https://fathom.video/share/cQouAwkMJGaCszjAm8Sdo4JY3skgLkQx?tab=summary&timestamp=541.0)
      - [**Constraint:** Email volume is limited to \~2,000/week, requiring a phased approach to reach the large follower base.](https://fathom.video/share/cQouAwkMJGaCszjAm8Sdo4JY3skgLkQx?tab=summary&timestamp=649.0)

### SIFT Campaign (LinkedIn Router)

  - [The automated router for LinkedIn post engagement is nearly ready for launch.](https://fathom.video/share/cQouAwkMJGaCszjAm8Sdo4JY3skgLkQx?tab=summary&timestamp=790.0)
  - [**Process:** Post engagement → Clay table segments by intent → Instantly/HeyReach campaign.](https://fathom.video/share/cQouAwkMJGaCszjAm8Sdo4JY3skgLkQx?tab=summary&timestamp=992.0)
  - [**Critical Update:** A HubSpot suppression step is required to prevent messaging contacts in active sales conversations.](https://fathom.video/share/cQouAwkMJGaCszjAm8Sdo4JY3skgLkQx?tab=summary&timestamp=940.0)
      - [**Action:** Mark Lim to add a check against the `Contact Understory Exclusion List` segment.](https://fathom.video/share/cQouAwkMJGaCszjAm8Sdo4JY3skgLkQx?tab=summary&timestamp=1051.0)
  - [**Copy Workflow:** Jason Gong will write copy in a Google Doc for Mark Lim to implement, bypassing direct access issues with Instantly.](https://fathom.video/share/cQouAwkMJGaCszjAm8Sdo4JY3skgLkQx?tab=summary&timestamp=1530.0)

### Sales Handoff Process

  - [**Problem:** No formal process exists to hand off warm event leads to sales.](https://fathom.video/share/cQouAwkMJGaCszjAm8Sdo4JY3skgLkQx?tab=summary&timestamp=1244.0)
  - [**Solution:** A new process will send all qualified leads event invites, regardless of sales funnel status.](https://fathom.video/share/cQouAwkMJGaCszjAm8Sdo4JY3skgLkQx?tab=summary&timestamp=1141.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This ensures maximum outreach and provides Tyler Pavlas with a list for personal follow-up, creating a high-touch experience.](https://fathom.video/share/cQouAwkMJGaCszjAm8Sdo4JY3skgLkQx?tab=summary&timestamp=1141.0)
  - [**Lead Handoff:** For strong fits (e.g., Together AI), the team will use the most frictionless path (e.g., email intro with Tyler CC'd).](https://fathom.video/share/cQouAwkMJGaCszjAm8Sdo4JY3skgLkQx?tab=summary&timestamp=1273.0)
  - [**Goal:** Increase new open opportunities from \~20 to 60+ per month.](https://fathom.video/share/cQouAwkMJGaCszjAm8Sdo4JY3skgLkQx?tab=summary&timestamp=1431.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Mark Lim:**](https://fathom.video/share/cQouAwkMJGaCszjAm8Sdo4JY3skgLkQx?tab=summary&timestamp=1615.0)
      - [Analyze webinar, Lovable, and Casey workshop data (registrants vs. attendees).](https://fathom.video/share/cQouAwkMJGaCszjAm8Sdo4JY3skgLkQx?tab=summary&timestamp=468.0)
      - [Add HubSpot suppression logic to the SIFT campaign Clay table.](https://fathom.video/share/cQouAwkMJGaCszjAm8Sdo4JY3skgLkQx?tab=summary&timestamp=940.0)
      - [Build SIFT campaign structure in Instantly/HeyReach.](https://fathom.video/share/cQouAwkMJGaCszjAm8Sdo4JY3skgLkQx?tab=summary&timestamp=1485.0)
  - [**Jason Gong:**](https://fathom.video/share/cQouAwkMJGaCszjAm8Sdo4JY3skgLkQx?tab=summary&timestamp=841.0)
      - [Write SIFT campaign copy in a Google Doc.](https://fathom.video/share/cQouAwkMJGaCszjAm8Sdo4JY3skgLkQx?tab=summary&timestamp=1530.0)
      - [Refine the `Contact Understory Exclusion List` HubSpot segment.](https://fathom.video/share/cQouAwkMJGaCszjAm8Sdo4JY3skgLkQx?tab=summary&timestamp=1093.0)
  - [**Lake Tahoe:**](https://fathom.video/share/cQouAwkMJGaCszjAm8Sdo4JY3skgLkQx?tab=summary&timestamp=1615.0)
      - [Share the Fletch workshop brief (Notion link) with Mark Lim today.](https://fathom.video/share/cQouAwkMJGaCszjAm8Sdo4JY3skgLkQx?tab=summary&timestamp=724.0)
      - [Define and implement the new sales handoff process with Tyler Pavlas.](https://fathom.video/share/cQouAwkMJGaCszjAm8Sdo4JY3skgLkQx?tab=summary&timestamp=1244.0)
